Requirement: System accepts a valid professional claim for an active member and active provider
Acceptance Criteria: Claim is accepted, adjudicated, stored, and visible with Paid status when all rules pass

Requirement: System denies claim when member is inactive on service date
Acceptance Criteria: Claim is denied, paid amount is zero, and denial reason is present

Requirement: System flags duplicate claim candidates before payment
Acceptance Criteria: Potential duplicate claim is suspended or routed for review and no payment is issued

Requirement: System returns accurate claim status through SOAP inquiry
Acceptance Criteria: SOAP response status, amounts, and denial reason match database and UI

Requirement: System creates remittance record for paid claims
Acceptance Criteria: Paid claims have a payment record and remittance identifier

Requirement: System requires denial reason for denied claim lines
Acceptance Criteria: Every denied line has a reason code visible to authorized users

Requirement: System prevents paid amount from exceeding allowed amount
Acceptance Criteria: Paid amount is less than or equal to allowed amount at claim and line level

Requirement: System validates provider contract active on service date
Acceptance Criteria: Inactive provider contract creates denial or review status

Requirement: System masks or restricts PHI by role
Acceptance Criteria: Unauthorized role cannot view restricted member fields

Requirement: System preserves status history for claim lifecycle
Acceptance Criteria: Latest status is correct and historical transitions are retained

Requirement: System rejects malformed SOAP request safely
Acceptance Criteria: Service returns controlled validation error with no stack trace or PHI

Requirement: System supports regression of paid denied suspended and adjusted flows
Acceptance Criteria: Regression pack executes with no critical or high failures
